name: hud_ui_background_update
description: HudUiBackground::Update snapshots mouse state, dispatches child hover/capture/button input, runs container child updates, and updates the input-focus cursor element.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Update@HudUiBackground@@QAEXM@Z at 0x4bc570 still fails: 438 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, 8 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 483 bytes, VC object symbol size 480 bytes.
Reviewed triage shows broad input-dispatch and focus-update control-flow drift; this remains functional-only until the HUD background/container cluster receives a binary-safe pass.
